pi_items.source: Task description (line 5), task.json metadata (line 17), and all scripts (setup_task.sh, export_result.sh)

Task description (line 5: 'City: San Francisco') and task.json metadata (line 20)
Task description (line 5: 'Department (OU): IT Dept') and task.json metadata (line 21)

privileged_info_summary: The task generates a self-signed SSL certificate for domain acmecorp.test with the following verified subject details: Organization=Acme Corp, City=San Francisco, Department (OU)=IT Dept, Common Name=acmecorp.test. The certificate is stored at /home/acmecorp/ssl.cert. These are synthetic data created during task environment setup, not from external public sources.
